name: Crock Pot Beef Bourguignon
recipeIngredient: 4 pounds Stew beef, cut into 1-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Thoroughly combine the first seven ingredients in a bowl.
2. Add the beef and marinate for at least 3 hours at room temperature, or overnight in the refrigerator.
3. Drain the meat, reserving 1 cup of marinade.
4. Place the meat in the removable liner of the crockpot.
5. Sprinkle with flour and salt, tossing to coat the meat evenly.
6. Add bacon, onions, garlic, and mushrooms to the liner.
7. Cook the bacon until it is crispy, then remove the cooked onions, garlic, and bacon using a slotted spoon and add them to the liner.
8. Saute the mushrooms in the remaining bacon fat (add butter if needed) and remove with a slotted spoon, adding them to the meat-onion mixture.
9. Pour the reserved 1 cup of marinade over everything.
10. Place the liner in the base of the crockpot.
11. Cover and cook on low for 6-7 hours, or medium for 8-10 hours, or high for 4-5 hours.
